key_point: AIDS is a condition caused by the HIV virus and is a sexually transmitted disease.
AIDS is a condition caused by the HIV virus and is a sexually transmitted disease (STD).
AIDS is a condition caused by the HIV virus, which is a sexually transmitted infection (STI), but AIDS itself is not classified as a sexually transmitted disease.
